_meta.description: Trap definitions for Canon Engine RPG

traps.name: Tripwire Snare
traps.description: A thin wire stretched across the path. Tripping it sends the victim sprawling.

traps.name: Poison Dart Trap

status_effect.name: Poisoned
status_effect.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

traps.description: A pressure plate triggers a volley of tiny poison-tipped darts from the wall.

traps.name: Pit Trap

status_effect.name: Trapped
status_effect.description: Stuck in a 10ft deep pit. DC 13 Athletics to climb out.

traps.description: A concealed pit covered with a thin layer of dirt and debris.

traps.name: Fire Glyph

status_effect.name: Burning
status_effect.description: Takes fire damage each turn until extinguished

traps.description: A glowing rune inscribed on the floor. When triggered, it erupts in a blast of flame.

traps.name: Frost Rune

status_effect.name: Frozen
status_effect.description: Speed halved, disadvantage on DEX saves and attacks

traps.description: An icy rune that flash-freezes anything that crosses its threshold.

traps.name: Net Trap

status_effect.name: Restrained
status_effect.description: Caught in a heavy net. DC 14 STR or DEX check to escape.

traps.description: A weighted net drops from above, ensnaring the victim.

traps.name: Alarm Trap

status_effect.name: Alerted
status_effect.description: Alerts nearby enemies to the party's presence. Stealth advantage lost.

traps.description: A string of bells or chimes that ring loudly when disturbed.

traps.name: Necrotic Circle

status_effect.name: Necrotic Wound
status_effect.effect: Max HP reduced by damage taken. Cannot be healed above reduced max.

traps.description: A circle of dark runes that drains life force from anyone who steps inside.

traps.name: Caltrops
traps.description: Scattered metal spikes that puncture feet and slow movement.
